evals.prompt: We're launching outbound to 500 enterprise accounts next month. How should I run ads to warm them up before our SDRs start reaching out?
evals.expected_output: ABM air cover strategy: start display + LinkedIn ads 2-4 weeks before outbound, awareness creative, coordinate with SDR team on messaging and timing

assertions.name: timing
assertions.description: Must recommend starting ads 2-4 weeks before SDR outreach begins to build awareness

assertions.name: channel_mix
assertions.description: Must suggest specific channels (display and/or LinkedIn) appropriate for an enterprise ABM awareness campaign

assertions.name: sales_alignment
assertions.description: Must emphasize sharing the target account list and campaign messaging with the SDR team for coordinated outreach

evals.prompt: I'm spending $8,000/month on LinkedIn Ads targeting mid-market SaaS companies but the results are terrible. CTR is 0.06% and I'm not seeing pipeline impact. What should I change?
evals.expected_output: Explain that low CTR is normal for B2B display, shift measurement to account-level engagement and pipeline influence, suggest creative and targeting improvements

assertions.name: ctr_expectations
assertions.description: Must explain that 0.06% CTR is normal for B2B display/social ads and that click-through rate is not the right success metric

assertions.name: measurement_shift
assertions.description: Must recommend measuring account-level engagement (website visits, content downloads) and pipeline influence instead of clicks

assertions.name: optimization_suggestions
assertions.description: Must suggest at least two concrete improvements — creative changes, audience refinement, channel mix, or landing page optimization

evals.prompt: We use ZoomInfo for prospecting and intent data. Should we also use ZoomInfo MarketingOS for advertising, or go with a dedicated ABM platform like Demandbase or 6sense?
evals.expected_output: Compare ZoomInfo MarketingOS vs dedicated ABM platforms, considering data unification advantage, feature depth, budget requirements, and team maturity

assertions.name: zoominfo_advantage
assertions.description: Must mention ZoomInfo MarketingOS's advantage of unified data — same platform for prospecting, intent, enrichment, and ads

assertions.name: dedicated_advantage
assertions.description: Must explain what dedicated ABM platforms (Demandbase/6sense) offer that ZoomInfo doesn't — deeper journey analytics, predictive models, or more advanced orchestration

assertions.name: recommendation_factors
assertions.description: Must frame the recommendation around the user's specific factors: budget, existing tech stack, team maturity, and campaign complexity
